case_title: MEX EXPRESS, INC. VS. PRO QUALITY BUILDING, INC.

docket_entries.description: FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 8/31/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,850.00 FILED BY MEX EXPRESS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT PRO QUALITY BUILDING, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-30-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEX EXPRESS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT PRO QUALITY BUILDING, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEX EXPRESS, INC.
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF RE: RESET OF TRIAL DATE TO ALLOW MORE TIME FOR SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEX EXPRESS, INC.
TRIAL RESET TO FEB-23-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF DEC-30-2016 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS-UNABLE TO FORWARD." COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PRO QUALITY BUILDING, INC.

ORDER CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEBRUARY 23, 2017 AT 1:30. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF MEX EXPRESS, INC'S REPRESENTATIVE JOSE MARTINEZ. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL NO APPEARANCES; NO PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
NO APPEARANCES. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
